title: AnniR - Nether Spawn
description: Addon to the datapack Annihilation Recreated that make the structure spawn in the nether
body:
## description

This datpack is an addon to the *[Annihilation Recreated](https://modrinth.com/datapack/annihilation-recreated) datapack*, that overwrite the way the structure corruption portal generate, so that it's *spawn in the Nether instead of the Overwold*.

> **WARNING**
>
> The structure still generate at the same coordinate (from `195,3,-1330` to `393,108,-1245`) but in the Nether
>
> Unless the gamerule `doMobSpawning` is set to false
>
> So please if you are loading this datapack with the Nether already generated, check that there are nothing important in this region

## How to install

When installing this datapack ***Make sure it has a higher priority than the Annihilation Recreated datapack*** otherwise it will not work !

> **NOTE** (If you have already installed the Annihilation Recreated datapack)
>
> This datapack will not reset the region where the previous structure was placed. And you will not be able to interact with it anymore (unless you disable the addon)
>
> To generate the structure in the Nether do `/function annihilation:admin/reset/structure`

## issue

If there is any issue please report it to the [Annihilation Recreated issues page](https://github.com/Julien2744/Annihilation-Recreated/issues) or the [Curseforge comments page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/annihilation-recreated/comments)
